title: zanthoxylum tetraphyllum
intro: Zanthoxylum tetraphyllum, also known as the four-angled prickly ash, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum tetraphyllum are attributed to its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
